commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared GitHub App installation-token helper, routes account/profile lookups and backup token minting through it, keeps arbitrary trusted-publisher repository lookups on PAT/anonymous auth, and updates generated API types, tests, and specs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR review rather than a standalone bug report. Source inspection and tests cover the intended fallback behavior, but the contributor has not provided real runtime proof of the changed GitHub auth path.

target.title: fix: use GitHub App auth for GitHub account lookups
target.body:
## Summary
- add a shared GitHub auth helper that mints/caches GitHub App installation tokens
- use GitHub App auth for account-age/profile lookups, with PAT/anonymous fallback
- move GitHub backup token minting onto the shared helper
- keep trusted-publisher arbitrary repo lookup on PAT/anonymous auth to avoid installation-token repo scope failures

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run convex/lib/githubAuth.test.ts convex/lib/githubAccount.test.ts convex/lib/githubActionsOidc.test.ts convex/lib/githubRestoreHelpers.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `bun run lint:oxlint -- convex/lib/githubAuth.ts convex/lib/githubAuth.test.ts convex/lib/githubAccount.ts convex/lib/githubAccount.test.ts convex/lib/githubActionsOidc.ts convex/lib/githubActionsOidc.test.ts convex/lib/githubBackup.ts convex/lib/githubSoulBackup.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`

## Review
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- Final result: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
